/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CurrencyCalculator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CurrencyCalculator.dir/src/currency.cpp.o -o CurrencyCalculator  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ivan/CLionProjects/CurrencyCalculator/build/_deps/cpr-build/cpr -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ivan/CLionProjects/CurrencyCalculator/build/_deps/curl-build/lib _deps/cpr-build/cpr/libcpr.1.9.0.dylib _deps/curl-build/lib/libcurl.dylib -framework SystemConfiguration -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssh2.dylib
